name: S3 server access logging not enabled
description: S3 server access logging is disabled for one or more buckets. Without access logs, it is impossible to audit bucket access, detect data exfiltration, or satisfy compliance audit requirements.
remediation: Enable server access logging for all S3 buckets. Send logs to a dedicated, encrypted, versioned audit bucket. Consider using AWS CloudTrail Data Events for API-level S3 audit logs.
